source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, $ABCD$ is a quadrilateral inscribed in circle $O$, and $\angle ABC = 125^\circ$. What is the measure of $\angle AOC$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} Given that quadrilateral $ABCD$ is inscribed in circle $O$,\\
it follows that $\angle D+\angle ABC=180^\circ$ \\
Since $\angle ABC=125^\circ$,\\
we have $\angle D=180^\circ−\angle A=180^\circ−125^\circ=55^\circ$,\\
By the Inscribed Angle Theorem, $\angle AOC=2\angle D= \boxed{110^\circ}$
